sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ يَحْمِي الْجِسْمَ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Jedenje svježeg povrća štiti tijelo od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Eating fresh vegetables protects the body from diseases.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَشْرَبَ لِتْرَيْنِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Moramo piti dvije litre vode dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: We must drink two liters of water daily.

sentences.arabic: الْفَوَاكِهُ تَمْنَحُنَا الْفِيتَامِينَاتِ الَّتِي نَحْتَاجُ إِلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Voće nam daje vitamine koji su nam potrebni.
sentences.translationEn: Fruits provide us with the vitamins we need.
